scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm -w @livinova/web run dev" "npm -w @livinova/api run start:dev"
scripts.build: npm -w @livinova/api run build && npm -w @livinova/web run build
scripts.lint: npm -w @livinova/api run lint && npm -w @livinova/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @livinova/api run typecheck && npm -w @livinova/web run typecheck
